intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No processes should be spawned from temporary directories.
notes: python3 is spawned from a script in /tmp/ -- the spawned_from_tmp L7 signal triggers divergence. Tests process lineage verification with python3.

live.inject_cmd:
cat > /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.py << 'TMPEOF'
import socket, ssl, sys
ip = "{TARGET_IP}"
try:
    sock = socket.create_connection((ip, 443), timeout=8)
    ctx = ssl._create_unverified_context()
    ssock = ctx.wrap_socket(sock, server_hostname="one.one.one.one")
    ssock.sendall(b"GET / HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: one.one.one.one\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n")
    ssock.recv(64)
    ssock.close()
    sock.close()
except Exception as e:
    print(f"err: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
print("ok")
TMPEOF
python3 /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.py
rm -f /tmp/ocsec_test_inject.py
